beats.narration: Every number in ultrasonic testing comes off a display, only as honest as the equipment chain behind it. Calibration makes that chain honest.

payload.title: THE HONEST CHAIN
payload.sub: Calibration equipment, from the screen back to the probe.

beats.narration: A gate watches one slice of the sweep. Whatever happens inside drives the alarm and lands on the recorder.
Automatic systems add machinery: a scanning bridge, a manipulator, a position encoder, and a speed limit set by the pulse repetition frequency.
Identical reflectors echo weaker when deeper: beam spread and attenuation. Electronic distance amplitude correction adds gain rising with time: equal reflectors, equal height, anywhere.
When machines inspect, the gate, alarm, and recorder make the call. Calibrate what decides. A system that shows the hole but never alarms is decoration.

payload.sub: The reference reflector must trip the alarm and reach the record.
